# OpenUsage

> Free, open-source terminal dashboard for monitoring AI coding tool usage and spend.

OpenUsage auto-detects 17 AI coding tools installed on your machine and displays live spend, quotas, model burn rates, and telemetry in a keyboard-driven terminal interface.

## Supported Providers

- Coding Agents: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, OpenCode
- API Platforms: OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, xAI, Gemini API, Alibaba Cloud, Z.AI
- Local Runtimes: Ollama

## Key Facts

- Written in Go, uses Bubble Tea for the TUI
- All data stays local (no external servers)
- 17 built-in color themes
- Background daemon stores telemetry in local SQLite
- Install: brew install janekbaraniewski/tap/openusage
- Source: https://github.com/janekbaraniewski/openusage
- License: Open source
